diagrams.title: Memory Hierarchy Pyramid
diagrams.description: Shows the organization of memory types from fastest/smallest to slowest/largest
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the trade-off between speed, size, and cost in memory systems

diagrams.title: SRAM vs DRAM Cell Structure
diagrams.description: Comparison of memory cell designs in SRAM and DRAM
elements: Shows how SRAM maintains state vs DRAM charge leakage
diagrams.purpose: Understand why SRAM is faster but more expensive than DRAM

diagrams.title: CPU-Memory Bus Connection
diagrams.description: Shows how address bus, data bus, and control bus connect CPU to memory
elements: Memory Chip with address and data lines
diagrams.purpose: Understand how CPU communicates with memory for read/write operations

diagrams.title: ROM Types Evolution
diagrams.description: Shows progression from Mask ROM to Flash Memory with key characteristics
diagrams.purpose: Compare programmability and erasability of different ROM types
